CheckTitle: Ensure user consent to applications is restricted
Description: Checks the authorization policy to ensure that users cannot consent to third-party applications on their own. Unrestricted user consent allows illicit consent grant attacks.
Risk: When users can consent to any app, an attacker can create a malicious app and trick users into granting it access to their mailbox, files, and profile. This is the 'illicit consent grant' attack — it requires no credential compromise.

Remediation.Recommendation: Set the default user role permission to not allow user consent to applications. Use the admin consent workflow so users can request consent that admins review and approve.
